name: No-Meat Burgers-in-a-Hurry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mashed tofu, rolled oats, wheat germ, finely minced onion (if using), onion powder, soy sauce, salt, basil, oregano, garlic powder, and black pepper together.
2. Knead the mixture until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into six patties.
4. Heat a lightly oiled cookie sheet to 325°F (163°C).
5. Fry the patties for 25 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are browned on all sides and cooked through.
6. Serve the patties on whole wheat bread or buns. Top with lettuce, tomato, alfalfa sprouts, grated carrot, onion, pickles, catsup, or mustard.
